# python-binance — Full Method Reference

> Auto-generated reference for all 797 public methods in python-binance.
> For a concise overview, see llms.txt.

## Convert

### `client.convert_accept_quote(**params)`
> Accept the offered quote by quote ID.
- `quoteId`: str — required - 457235734584567
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.convert_request_quote(**params)`
> Request a quote for the requested token pairs
- `fromAsset`: str — required - Asset to convert from - BUSD
- `toAsset`: str — required - Asset to convert to - BTC
- `fromAmount`: decimal — EITHER - When specified, it is the amount you will be debited after the conve...
- `toAmount`: decimal — EITHER - When specified, it is the amount you will be credited after the conv...
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

## Futures Coin-M

### `client.futures_coin_account(**params)`
> Get current account information.

### `client.futures_coin_account_balance(**params)`
> Get futures account balance

### `client.futures_coin_account_order_history_download(**params)`
> Get Download Id For Futures Order History
- `startTime`: int — required - Start timestamp in ms
- `endTime`: int — required - End timestamp in ms
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.futures_coin_account_trade_history_download(**params)`
> Get Download Id For Futures Trade History (USER_DATA)
- `startTime`: int — required - Start timestamp in ms
- `endTime`: int — required - End timestamp in ms

### `client.futures_coin_account_trade_history_download_link(**params)`
> Get futures trade download link by Id
- `downloadId`: str — required - Download ID obtained from futures_coin_trade_download_id

### `client.futures_coin_account_trades(**params)`
> Get trades for the authenticated account and symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_accout_order_history_download_link(**params)`
> Get futures order history download link by Id
- `downloadId`: str — required - Download ID obtained from futures_coin_download_id
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.futures_coin_aggregate_trades(**params)`
> Get compressed, aggregate trades. Trades that fill at the time, from the same order, with the same price will have the quantity aggregated.

### `client.futures_coin_basis(**params)`
> Get future basis of a specific symbol

### `client.futures_coin_cancel_all_open_orders(**params)`
> Cancel all open futures orders

### `client.futures_coin_cancel_order(**params)`
> Cancel an active futures order.

### `client.futures_coin_cancel_orders(**params)`
> Cancel multiple futures orders

### `client.futures_coin_change_leverage(**params)`
> Change user's initial leverage of specific symbol market

### `client.futures_coin_change_margin_type(**params)`
> Change the margin type for a symbol

### `client.futures_coin_change_position_margin(**params)`
> Change the position margin for a symbol

### `client.futures_coin_change_position_mode(**params)`
> Change user's position mode (Hedge Mode or One-way Mode ) on EVERY symbol

### `client.futures_coin_continous_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for a specific contract type. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.

### `client.futures_coin_countdown_cancel_all(**params)`
> Cancel all open orders of the specified symbol at the end of the specified countdown.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `countdownTime`: int — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_coin_create_order(**params)`
> Send in a new order.

### `client.futures_coin_exchange_info()`
> Current exchange trading rules and symbol information

### `client.futures_coin_funding_rate(**params)`
> Get funding rate history

### `client.futures_coin_get_all_orders(**params)`
> Get all futures account orders; active, canceled, or filled.

### `client.futures_coin_get_open_order(**params)`
> Get current open order.

### `client.futures_coin_get_open_orders(**params)`
> Get all open orders on a symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_get_order(**params)`
> Check an order's status.

### `client.futures_coin_get_position_mode(**params)`
> Get user's position mode (Hedge Mode or One-way Mode ) on EVERY symbol

### `client.futures_coin_global_longshort_ratio(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top positions of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_historical_trades(**params)`
> Get older market historical trades.

### `client.futures_coin_income_history(**params)`
> Get income history for authenticated account

### `client.futures_coin_index_price_constituents(**params)`
> Get index price constituents

### `client.futures_coin_index_price_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for the index price of a pair..

### `client.futures_coin_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for a symbol. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.

### `client.futures_coin_leverage_bracket(**params)`
> Notional and Leverage Brackets

### `client.futures_coin_liquidation_orders(**params)`
> Get all liquidation orders

### `client.futures_coin_mark_price(**params)`
> Get Mark Price and Funding Rate

### `client.futures_coin_mark_price_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for the index price of a pair..

### `client.futures_coin_modify_order(**params)`
> Modify an existing order. Currently only LIMIT order modification is supported.

### `client.futures_coin_open_interest(**params)`
> Get present open interest of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_open_interest_hist(**params)`
> Get open interest statistics of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_order_book(**params)`
> Get the Order Book for the market

### `client.futures_coin_orderbook_ticker(**params)`
> Best price/qty on the order book for a symbol or symbols.

### `client.futures_coin_ping()`
> Test connectivity to the Rest API

### `client.futures_coin_place_batch_order(**params)`
> Send in new orders. To avoid modifying the existing signature generation and parameter order logic, the url encoding is done on the special query param, batchOrders, in the early stage.

### `client.futures_coin_position_information(**params)`
> Get position information

### `client.futures_coin_position_margin_history(**params)`
> Get position margin change history

### `client.futures_coin_premium_index_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for the index price of a pair..

### `client.futures_coin_recent_trades(**params)`
> Get recent trades (up to last 500).

### `client.futures_coin_stream_close(listenKey)`

### `client.futures_coin_stream_get_listen_key()`

### `client.futures_coin_stream_keepalive(listenKey)`

### `client.futures_coin_symbol_ticker(**params)`
> Latest price for a symbol or symbols.

### `client.futures_coin_taker_buy_sell_volume(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top positions of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_ticker(**params)`
> 24 hour rolling window price change statistics.

### `client.futures_coin_time()`
> Test connectivity to the Rest API and get the current server time.

### `client.futures_coin_top_longshort_account_ratio(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top positions of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_coin_top_longshort_position_ratio(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top positions of a specific symbol.

## Futures USD-M

### `client.futures_account(**params)`
> Get current account information.

### `client.futures_account_balance(**params)`
> Get futures account balance

### `client.futures_account_config(**params)`
> Get futures account configuration

### `client.futures_account_trades(**params)`
> Get trades for the authenticated account and symbol.

### `client.futures_account_transfer(**params)`
> Execute transfer between spot account and futures account.

### `client.futures_adl_quantile_estimate(**params)`
> Get Position ADL Quantile Estimate

### `client.futures_aggregate_trades(**params)`
> Get compressed, aggregate trades. Trades that fill at the time, from the same order, with the same price will have the quantity aggregated.

### `client.futures_api_trading_status(**params)`
> Get quantitative trading rules for order placement, such as Unfilled Ratio (UFR), Good-Til-Canceled Ratio (GCR), Immediate-or-Cancel (IOC) & Fill-or-Kill (FOK) Expire Ratio (IFER), among others.
- `symbol`: str — optional

### `client.futures_basis(**params)`
> Get future basis of a specific symbol

### `client.futures_cancel_algo_order(**params)`
> Cancel an active algo order.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `algoId`: int — optional - Either algoId or clientAlgoId must be sent
- `clientAlgoId`: str — optional - Either algoId or clientAlgoId must be sent
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_cancel_all_algo_open_orders(**params)`
> Cancel all open algo orders
- `symbol`: str — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_cancel_all_open_orders(**params)`
> Cancel all open futures orders
- `conditional`: bool — optional - Set to True to cancel algo/conditional orders

### `client.futures_cancel_order(**params)`
> Cancel an active futures order.
- `conditional`: bool — optional - Set to True to cancel algo/conditional order
- `algoId`: int — optional - Algo order ID (for conditional orders)
- `clientAlgoId`: str — optional - Client algo order ID (for conditional orders)

### `client.futures_cancel_orders(**params)`
> Cancel multiple futures orders

### `client.futures_change_leverage(**params)`
> Change user's initial leverage of specific symbol market

### `client.futures_change_margin_type(**params)`
> Change the margin type for a symbol

### `client.futures_change_multi_assets_mode(multiAssetsMargin)`
> Change user's Multi-Assets mode (Multi-Assets Mode or Single-Asset Mode) on Every symbol

### `client.futures_change_position_margin(**params)`
> Change the position margin for a symbol

### `client.futures_change_position_mode(**params)`
> Change position mode for authenticated account

### `client.futures_commission_rate(**params)`
> Get Futures commission rate
- `symbol`: str — required

### `client.futures_continuous_klines(**params)`
> Kline/candlestick bars for a specific contract type. Klines are uniquely identified by their open time.

### `client.futures_countdown_cancel_all(**params)`
> Cancel all open orders of the specified symbol at the end of the specified countdown.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `countdownTime`: int — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_create_algo_order(**params)`
> Send in a new algo order (conditional order).
- `algoType`: str — required - Only support CONDITIONAL
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: str — required - BUY or SELL
- `positionSide`: str — optional - Default BOTH for One-way Mode; LONG or SHORT for Hedge Mode
- `type`: str — required - STOP_MARKET/TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET/STOP/TAKE_PROFIT/TRAILING_STOP_MARKET
- `timeInForce`: str — optional - IOC or GTC or FOK or GTX, default GTC
- `quantity`: decimal — optional - Cannot be sent with closePosition=true
- `price`: decimal — optional
- `triggerPrice`: decimal — optional - Used with STOP, STOP_MARKET, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET
- `workingType`: str — optional - triggerPrice triggered by: MARK_PRICE, CONTRACT_PRICE. Default CON...
- `priceMatch`: str — optional - only available for LIMIT/STOP/TAKE_PROFIT order
- `closePosition`: str — optional - true, false; Close-All, used with STOP_MARKET or TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET
- `priceProtect`: str — optional - "TRUE" or "FALSE", default "FALSE"
- `reduceOnly`: str — optional - "true" or "false", default "false"
- `activatePrice`: decimal — optional - Used with TRAILING_STOP_MARKET orders
- `callbackRate`: decimal — optional - Used with TRAILING_STOP_MARKET orders, min 0.1, max 10
- `clientAlgoId`: str — optional - A unique id among open orders
- `newOrderRespType`: str — optional - "ACK", "RESULT", default "ACK"
- `selfTradePreventionMode`: str — optional - EXPIRE_TAKER, EXPIRE_MAKER, EXPIRE_BOTH, default NONE
- `goodTillDate`: long — optional - order cancel time for timeInForce GTD
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_create_order(**params)`
> Send in a new order. Note: After 2025-12-09, conditional order types (STOP, STOP_MARKET, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_MARKET, TRAILING_STOP_MARKET) are automatically routed to the algo order endpoint.

### `client.futures_create_test_order(**params)`
> Testing order request, this order will not be submitted to matching engine

### `client.futures_cross_collateral_adjust_history(**params)`

### `client.futures_cross_collateral_liquidation_history(**params)`

### `client.futures_delivery_price(**params)`
> Get latest price for a symbol or symbols

### `client.futures_exchange_info()`
> Current exchange trading rules and symbol information

### `client.futures_funding_rate(**params)`
> Get funding rate history

### `client.futures_get_algo_order(**params)`
> Check an algo order's status.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `algoId`: int — optional - Either algoId or clientAlgoId must be sent
- `clientAlgoId`: str — optional - Either algoId or clientAlgoId must be sent
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_get_all_algo_orders(**params)`
> Get all algo account orders; active, canceled, or filled.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional - Default 100; max 100
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_get_all_orders(**params)`
> Get all futures account orders; active, canceled, or filled.
- `conditional`: bool — optional - Set to True to query algo/conditional orders

### `client.futures_get_multi_assets_mode()`
> Get user's Multi-Assets mode (Multi-Assets Mode or Single-Asset Mode) on Every symbol

### `client.futures_get_open_algo_orders(**params)`
> Get all open algo orders on a symbol.
- `symbol`: str — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.futures_get_open_orders(**params)`
> Get all open orders on a symbol.
- `conditional`: bool — optional - Set to True to query algo/conditional orders

### `client.futures_get_order(**params)`
> Check an order's status.
- `conditional`: bool — optional - Set to True to query algo/conditional order
- `algoId`: int — optional - Algo order ID (for conditional orders)
- `clientAlgoId`: str — optional - Client algo order ID (for conditional orders)

### `client.futures_get_position_mode(**params)`
> Get position mode for authenticated account

### `client.futures_global_longshort_ratio(**params)`
> Get present global long to short ratio of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_historical_data_link(**params)`
> Get Future TickLevel Orderbook Historical Data Download Link.
- `symbol`: str — STRING - Required - Symbol name, e.g. BTCUSDT or BTCUSD_PERP
- `dataType`: str — ENUM - Required - Data type: - T_DEPTH for ticklevel orderbook data - S_DEPTH...
- `startTime`: int — LONG - Required - Start time in milliseconds
- `endTime`: int — LONG - Required - End time in milliseconds
- `recvWindow`: int — LONG - Optional - Number of milliseconds after timestamp the request is valid...
- `timestamp`: int — LONG - Required - Current timestamp in milliseconds

### `client.futures_historical_klines(symbol, interval, start_str, end_str=None, limit=None)`
> Get historical futures klines from Binance
- `symbol`: str — Name of symbol pair e.g. BNBBTC
- `interval`: str — Binance Kline interval
- `start_str`: str|int — Start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds
- `end_str`: str|int — optional - end date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds (defaul...
- `limit`: int — Default None (fetches full range in batches of max 1000 per request). To limi...

### `client.futures_historical_klines_generator(symbol, interval, start_str, end_str=None)`
> Get historical futures klines generator from Binance
- `symbol`: str — Name of symbol pair e.g. BNBBTC
- `interval`: str — Binance Kline interval
- `start_str`: str|int — Start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds
- `end_str`: str|int — optional - end date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds (defaul...

### `client.futures_historical_mark_price_klines(symbol, interval, start_str, end_str=None, limit=None)`

- `symbol`: str — Name of symbol pair e.g. BNBBTC
- `interval`: str — Binance Kline interval
- `start_str`: str|int — Start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds
- `end_str`: str|int — optional - end date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds (defaul...
- `limit`: int — Default None (fetches full range in batches of max 1000 per request). To limi...

> Get recent trades (up to last 500).

### `client.futures_rpi_depth(**params)`
> Get RPI Order Book with Retail Price Improvement orders
- `symbol`: str — required
- `limit`: int — Default 1000; Valid limits:[1000]

### `client.futures_stream_close(listenKey)`

### `client.futures_stream_get_listen_key()`

### `client.futures_stream_keepalive(listenKey)`

### `client.futures_symbol_adl_risk(**params)`
> Query the symbol-level ADL (Auto-Deleveraging) risk rating The ADL risk rating measures the likelihood of ADL during liquidation. Rating can be: high, medium, low. Updated every 30 minutes.
- `symbol`: str — optional - if not provided, returns ADL risk for all symbols

### `client.futures_symbol_config(**params)`
> Get current account symbol configuration

### `client.futures_symbol_ticker(**params)`
> Latest price for a symbol or symbols.

### `client.futures_taker_longshort_ratio(**params)`
> Get taker buy to sell volume ratio of a specific symbol

### `client.futures_ticker(**params)`
> 24 hour rolling window price change statistics.

### `client.futures_time()`
> Test connectivity to the Rest API and get the current server time.

### `client.futures_top_longshort_account_ratio(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top accounts of a specific symbol.

### `client.futures_top_longshort_position_ratio(**params)`
> Get present long to short ratio for top positions of a specific symbol.

## Gift Card

### `client.gift_card_create(**params)`
> This API is for creating a Binance Gift Card. To get started with, please make sure: - You have a Binance account - You have passed KYB - You have a sufﬁcient balance(Gift Card amount and fee amount) in your Binance funding wallet - You need Enable Withdrawals for the API Key which requests this endpoint.
- `token`: str — The token type contained in the Binance Gift Card
- `amount`: float — The amount of the token contained in the Binance Gift Card

### `client.gift_card_create_dual_token(**params)`
> This API is for creating a dual-token ( stablecoin-denominated) Binance Gift Card. You may create a gift card using USDT as baseToken, that is redeemable to another designated token (faceToken). For example, you can create a fixed-value BTC gift card and pay with 100 USDT plus 1 USDT fee. This gift card can keep the value fixed at 100 USDT before redemption, and will be redeemable to BTC equivalent to 100 USDT upon redemption. Once successfully created, the amount of baseToken (e.g. USDT) in the fixed-value gift card along with the fee would be deducted from your funding wallet. To get started with, please make sure: - You have a Binance account - You have passed KYB - You have a sufﬁcient balance(Gift Card amount and fee amount) in your Binance funding wallet - You need Enable Withdrawals for the API Key which requests this endpoint.
- `baseToken`: str — The token you want to pay, example: BUSD
- `faceToken`: str — The token you want to buy, example: BNB. If faceToken = baseToken, it's the s...
- `discount`: float — Stablecoin-denominated card discount percentage, Example: 1 for 1% discount. ...

### `client.gift_card_fetch_rsa_public_key(**params)`
> This API is for fetching the RSA Public Key. This RSA Public key will be used to encrypt the card code. Important Note: The RSA Public key fetched is valid only for the current day.
- `recvWindow`: int — The receive window for the request in milliseconds (optional)

### `client.gift_card_fetch_token_limit(**params)`
> Verify which tokens are available for you to create Stablecoin-Denominated gift cards
- `baseToken`: str — The token you want to pay, example: BUSD

### `client.gift_card_redeem(**params)`
> This API is for redeeming a Binance Gift Card. Once redeemed, the coins will be deposited in your funding wallet. Important Note: If you enter the wrong redemption code 5 times within 24 hours, you will no longer be able to redeem any Binance Gift Cards that day. Code Format Options: - Plaintext - Encrypted (Recommended for better security) For encrypted format: 1. Fetch RSA public key from the RSA public key endpoint 2. Encrypt the code using algorithm: RSA/ECB/OAEPWithSHA-256AndMGF1Padding
- `code`: str — Redemption code of Binance Gift Card to be redeemed, supports both Plaintext ...
- `externalUid`: str — External unique ID representing a user on the partner platform. Helps identif...
- `recvWindow`: int — The receive window for the request in milliseconds (optional)

### `client.gift_card_verify(**params)`
> This API is for verifying whether the Binance Gift Card is valid or not by entering Gift Card Number. Important Note: If you enter the wrong Gift Card Number 5 times within an hour, you will no longer be able to verify any Gift Card Number for that hour.
- `referenceNo`: str — Enter the Gift Card Number

## Margin

### `client.margin_borrow_repay(**params)`
> Margin Account Borrow/Repay (MARGIN)
- `asset`: str — required
- `amount`: float — required
- `isIsolated`: str — optional - for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE", default "FALSE"
- `symbol`: str — optional - isolated symbol
- `type`: str - BORROW or REPAY — str

### `client.margin_create_listen_token(symbol=None, is_isolated=False, validity=None)`
> Create a listenToken for margin account user data stream
- `symbol`: str — Trading pair symbol (required when is_isolated=True)
- `is_isolated`: bool — Whether it is isolated margin (default: False for cross-margin)
- `validity`: int — Validity in milliseconds (default: 24 hours, max: 24 hours)

### `client.margin_get_borrow_repay_records(**params)`
> Query Query borrow/repay records in Margin account (USER_DATA)
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — optional - isolated symbol
- `txId`: int — optional - the tranId in POST /sapi/v1/margin/loan
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `current`: int — optional - Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — optional - Default:10 Max:100

### `client.margin_interest_history(**params)`
> Get Interest History (USER_DATA)
- `asset`: str — optional
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — optional - isolated symbol
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `current`: int — optional - Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — optional - Default:10 Max:100

### `client.margin_interest_rate_history(**params)`
> Query Margin Interest Rate History (USER_DATA)
- `asset`: str — required
- `vipLevel`: int — optional
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional

### `client.margin_manual_liquidation(**params)`
- `type`: str: When type selected is "ISOLATED", symbol must be filled in — required

### `client.margin_max_borrowable(**params)`
> Query Max Borrow (USER_DATA)
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — optional - isolated symbol

### `client.margin_next_hourly_interest_rate(**params)`
> Get future hourly interest rate (USER_DATA)
- `assets`: str — required - List of assets, separated by commas, up to 20
- `isIsolated`: bool — required - for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"

### `client.margin_stream_close(listenKey)`
> Close out a cross-margin data stream.
- `listenKey`: str — required

### `client.margin_stream_get_listen_key()`
> Start a new cross-margin data stream and return the listen key If a stream already exists it should return the same key. If the stream becomes invalid a new key is returned. Can be used to keep the stream alive.

### `client.margin_stream_keepalive(listenKey)`
> PING a cross-margin data stream to prevent a time out.
- `listenKey`: str — required

## Options

### `client.options_accept_block_trade_order(**params)`
> Accept Block Trade Order (TRADE) Accept a block trade order.
- `blockOrderMatchingKey`: str — required - Block Order Matching Key
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_account_get_block_trades(**params)`
> Account Block Trade List (USER_DATA) Gets block trades for a specific account.
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `underlying`: str — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_account_info(**params)`
> Account asset info (USER_DATA)
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_bill(**params)`
> Account funding flow (USER_DATA)
- `currency`: str — required - Asset type - USDT
- `recordId`: int — optional - Return the recordId and subsequent data, the latest data is return...
- `startTime`: int — optional - Start Time - 1593511200000
- `endTime`: int — optional - End Time - 1593511200000
- `limit`: int — optional - Number of result sets returned Default:100 Max:1000 - 100
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_cancel_all_orders(**params)`
> Cancel all Option orders (TRADE)
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_cancel_batch_order(**params)`
> Cancel Multiple Option orders (TRADE)
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `orderIds`: list — optional - Order ID - [4611875134427365377,4611875134427365378]
- `clientOrderIds`: list — optional - User-defined order ID - ["my_id_1","my_id_2"]
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_cancel_block_trade_order(**params)`
> Cancel Block Trade Order (TRADE)
- `blockOrderMatchingKey`: str — required - Block Order Matching Key
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_cancel_order(**params)`
> Cancel Option order (TRADE)
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `orderId`: str — optional - Order ID - 4611875134427365377
- `clientOrderId`: str — optional - User-defined order ID - 10000
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_create_block_trade_order(**params)`
> New Block Trade Order (TRADE)
- `liquidity`: str — required - Taker or Maker
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair, e.g BTC-200730-9000-C
- `side`: str — required - BUY or SELL
- `price`: float — required - Order Price
- `quantity`: float — required - Order Quantity
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_exchange_info()`
> Get current limit info and trading pair info

### `client.options_exercise_record(**params)`
> Get account exercise records.
- `symbol`: str — optional
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_extend_block_trade_order(**params)`
> Extend Block Trade Order (TRADE) Extends a block trade expire time by 30 mins from the current time.
- `blockOrderMatchingKey`: str — required - Block Order Matching Key
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_funds_transfer(**params)`
> Funds transfer (USER_DATA)
- `currency`: str — required - Asset type - USDT
- `type`: str (ENUM) — required - IN: Transfer from spot account to option account OUT: Transfer fro...
- `amount`: float — required - Amount - 10000
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_get_bill(**params)`
> Get account funding flows
- `currency`: str — required
- `recordId`: int — optional
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_get_block_trade_order(**params)`
> Query Block Trade Details (USER_DATA) Query block trade details; returns block trade details from counterparty's perspective.
- `blockOrderMatchingKey`: str — required - Block Order Matching Key
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_get_block_trade_orders(**params)`
> Query Block Trade Order (TRADE) Check block trade order status.
- `blockOrderMatchingKey`: str — optional - Returns specific block trade for this key
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `underlying`: str — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.options_get_market_maker_protection_config(**params)`
> Get config for MMP.
- `underlying`: str — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_historical_trades(**params)`
> Query trade history
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `fromId`: int — optional - The deal ID from which to return. The latest deal record is return...
- `limit`: int — optional - Number of records Default:100 Max:500 - 100

### `client.options_index_price(**params)`
> Get the spot index price
- `underlying`: str — required - Spot pair（Option contract underlying asset）- BTCUSDT

### `client.options_info()`
> Get current trading pair info

### `client.options_klines(**params)`
> Candle data
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `interval`: str — required - Time interval - 5m
- `startTime`: int — optional - Start Time - 1592317127349
- `endTime`: int — optional - End Time - 1592317127349
- `limit`: int — optional - Number of records Default:500 Max:1500 - 500

### `client.options_mark_price(**params)`
> Get the latest mark price
- `symbol`: str — optional - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C

### `client.options_open_interest(**params)`
> Get present open interest specific underlying asset on specific expiration date.
- `params`: dict — parameters required by the endpoint
- `underlyingAsset`: str — required
- `expiration`: str — required (e.g '221225')

### `client.options_order_book(**params)`
> Depth information
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `limit`: int — optional - Default:100 Max:1000.Optional value:[10, 20, 50, 100, 500, 1000] -...

### `client.options_ping()`
> Test connectivity

### `client.options_place_batch_order(**params)`
> Place Multiple Option orders (TRADE)
- `orders`: list — required - order list. Max 5 orders - [{"symbol":"BTC-210115-35000-C","price"...
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_place_order(**params)`
> Option order (TRADE)
- `symbol`: str — required - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `side`: str (ENUM) — required - Buy/sell direction: SELL, BUY - BUY
- `type`: str (ENUM) — required - Order Type: LIMIT, MARKET - LIMIT
- `quantity`: float — required - Order Quantity - 3
- `price`: float — optional - Order Price - 1000
- `timeInForce`: str (ENUM) — optional - Time in force method（Default GTC) - GTC
- `reduceOnly`: bool — optional - Reduce Only (Default false) - false
- `postOnly`: bool — optional - Post Only (Default false) - false
- `newOrderRespType`: str (ENUM) — optional - "ACK", "RESULT", Default "ACK" - ACK
- `clientOrderId`: str — optional - User-defined order ID cannot be repeated in pending orders - 10000
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_positions(**params)`
> Option holdings info (USER_DATA)
- `symbol`: str — optional - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_post_market_maker_protection_config(**params)`

- `underlying`: str — required
- `windowTimeInMilliseconds`: int — required
- `frozenTimeInMilliseconds`: int — required
- `qtyLimit`: decimal — required
- `deltaLimit`: decimal — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.options_price(**params)`
> Get the latest price
- `symbol`: str — optional - Option trading pair - BTC-200730-9000-C

- `startTime`: int — optional - Start Time - 1593511200000
- `endTime`: int — optional - End Time - 1593511200000
- `limit`: int — optional - Number of result sets returned Default:100 Max:1000 - 100
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

- `endTime`: int — optional - End Time - 1593511200000
- `limit`: int — optional - Number of result sets returned Default:100 Max:1000 - 100
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.papi_get_cm_position_side_dual(**params)`
> Get user's position mode (Hedge Mode or One-way Mode ) on EVERY symbol in CM.
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.papi_v1_post_ping(**params)`
> Placeholder function for POST /papi/v1/ping. Note: This function was auto-generated. Any issue please open an issue on GitHub.
- `params`: dict — parameters required by the endpoint

## Spot / General

### `client.aggregate_trade_iter(symbol, start_str=None, last_id=None)`
> Iterate over aggregate trade data from (start_time or last_id) to the end of the history so far. If start_time is specified, start with the first trade after start_time. Meant to initialise a local cache of trade data. If last_id is specified, start with the trade after it. This is meant for updating a pre-existing local trade data cache. Only allows start_str or last_id—not both. Not guaranteed to work right if you're running more than one of these simultaneously. You will probably hit your rate limit. See dateparser docs for valid start and end string formats http://dateparser.readthedocs.io/en/latest/ If using offset strings for dates add "UTC" to date string e.g. "now UTC", "11 hours ago UTC"
- `symbol`: str — Symbol string e.g. ETHBTC
- `start_str`: str|int — Start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds. The iterator wi...
- `last_id`: int — aggregate trade ID of the last known aggregate trade. Not a regular trade ID....

### `client.cancel_all_open_margin_orders(**params)`
> Cancels all active orders on a symbol for margin account.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.cancel_all_open_orders(**params)`
> Cancel all open orders on a symbol.
- `symbol`: str — required

### `client.cancel_margin_oco_order(**params)`
> Cancel an entire Order List for a margin account.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"，default "FALSE"
- `orderListId`: int — Either orderListId or listClientOrderId must be provided
- `listClientOrderId`: str — Either orderListId or listClientOrderId must be provided
- `newClientOrderId`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.cancel_margin_order(**params)`
> Cancel an active order for margin account. Either orderId or origClientOrderId must be sent.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `orderId`: str
- `origClientOrderId`: str
- `newClientOrderId`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.cancel_order(**params)`
> Cancel an active order. Either orderId or origClientOrderId must be sent.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `orderId`: int — The unique order id
- `origClientOrderId`: str — optional
- `newClientOrderId`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.cancel_replace_order(**params)`
> Cancels an existing order and places a new order on the same symbol. Filters and Order Count are evaluated before the processing of the cancellation and order placement occurs. A new order that was not attempted (i.e. when newOrderResult: NOT_ATTEMPTED), will still increase the order count by 1.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: enum — required
- `type`: enum — required
- `cancelReplaceMode`: enum — required - STOP_ON_FAILURE or ALLOW_FAILURE
- `timeInForce`: enum — optional
- `quantity`: decimal — optional
- `quoteOrderQty`: decimal — optional
- `price`: decimal — optional
- `cancelNewClientOrderId`: str — optional - Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by ...
- `cancelOrigClientOrderId`: str — optional - Either the cancelOrigClientOrderId or cancelOrderId must be provid...
- `cancelOrderId`: long — optional - Either the cancelOrigClientOrderId or cancelOrderId must be provid...
- `newClientOrderId`: str — optional - Used to identify the new order.
- `strategyId`: int — optional
- `strategyType`: int — optional - The value cannot be less than 1000000.
- `stopPrice`: decimal — optional
- `trailingDelta`: long — optional
- `icebergQty`: decimal — optional
- `newOrderRespType`: enum — optional - ACK, RESULT or FULL. MARKET and LIMIT orders types default to FULL...
- `selfTradePreventionMode`: enum — optional - EXPIRE_TAKER, EXPIRE_MAKER, EXPIRE_BOTH or NONE.
- `cancelRestrictions`: enum — optional - ONLY_NEW or ONLY_PARTIALLY_FILLED
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - The value cannot be greater than 60000

### `client.change_fixed_activity_to_daily_position(**params)`
> Change Fixed/Activity Position to Daily Position

### `client.close_connection()`

### `client.create_isolated_margin_account(**params)`
> Create isolated margin account for symbol
- `base`: str — Base asset of symbol
- `quote`: str — Quote asset of symbol .. code:: python pair_details = client.create_isolated_...

### `client.create_margin_loan(**params)`
> Apply for a loan in cross-margin or isolated-margin account.
- `asset`: str — name of the asset
- `amount`: str — amount to transfer
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `symbol`: str — Isolated margin symbol (default blank for cross-margin)
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.create_margin_oco_order(**params)`
> Post a new OCO trade for margin account.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"，default "FALSE"
- `listClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the list order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `side`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `limitClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the limit order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `price`: str — required
- `limitIcebergQty`: decimal — Used to make the LIMIT_MAKER leg an iceberg order.
- `stopClientOrderId`: str — A unique Id for the stop loss/stop loss limit leg. Automatically generated if...
- `stopPrice`: str — required
- `stopLimitPrice`: str — If provided, stopLimitTimeInForce is required.
- `stopIcebergQty`: decimal — Used with STOP_LOSS_LIMIT leg to make an iceberg order.
- `stopLimitTimeInForce`: str — Valid values are GTC/FOK/IOC.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `sideEffectType`: str — NO_SIDE_EFFECT, MARGIN_BUY, AUTO_REPAY; default NO_SIDE_EFFECT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.create_margin_order(**params)`
> Post a new order for margin account.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `side`: str — required
- `type`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `price`: str — required
- `stopPrice`: str — Used with STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT orders.
- `timeInForce`: str — required if limit order GTC,IOC,FOK
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `icebergQty`: str — Used with LIMIT, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT to create an iceberg ...
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; MARKET and LIMIT order types def...
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.create_oco_order(**params)`
> Send in an one-cancels-the-other (OCO) pair, where activation of one order immediately cancels the other. An OCO has 2 orders called the above order and below order. One of the orders must be a LIMIT_MAKER/TAKE_PROFIT/TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT order and the other must be STOP_LOSS or STOP_LOSS_LIMIT order. Price restrictions: If the OCO is on the SELL side: LIMIT_MAKER/TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT price > Last Traded Price > STOP_LOSS/STOP_LOSS_LIMIT stopPrice TAKE_PROFIT stopPrice > Last Traded Price > STOP_LOSS/STOP_LOSS_LIMIT stopPrice If the OCO is on the BUY side: LIMIT_MAKER/TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT price < Last Traded Price < stopPrice TAKE_PROFIT stopPrice < Last Traded Price < STOP_LOSS/STOP_LOSS_LIMIT stopPrice Weight: 1
- `symbol`: str — required
- `listClientOrderId`: str — Arbitrary unique ID among open order lists. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `side`: str — required - BUY or SELL
- `quantity`: decimal — required - Quantity for both orders of the order list
- `aboveType`: str — required - STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, STOP_LOSS, LIMIT_MAKER, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_...
- `aboveClientOrderId`: str — Arbitrary unique ID among open orders for the above order
- `aboveIcebergQty`: decimal — Note that this can only be used if aboveTimeInForce is GTC
- `abovePrice`: decimal — Can be used if aboveType is STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, LIMIT_MAKER, or TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT
- `aboveStopPrice`: decimal — Can be used if aboveType is STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PRO...
- `aboveTrailingDelta`: int — See Trailing Stop order FAQ
- `aboveTimeInForce`: str — Required if aboveType is STOP_LOSS_LIMIT or TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT
- `aboveStrategyId`: int — Arbitrary numeric value identifying the above order within an order strategy
- `aboveStrategyType`: int — Arbitrary numeric value identifying the above order strategy (>= 1000000)
- `belowType`: str — required - STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT, TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT
- `belowClientOrderId`: str — Arbitrary unique ID among open orders for the below order
- `belowIcebergQty`: decimal — Note that this can only be used if belowTimeInForce is GTC
- `belowPrice`: decimal — Can be used if belowType is STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, LIMIT_MAKER, or TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT
- `belowStopPrice`: decimal — Can be used if belowType is STOP_LOSS, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, TAKE_PROFIT or TAKE_P...
- `belowTrailingDelta`: int — See Trailing Stop order FAQ
- `belowTimeInForce`: str — Required if belowType is STOP_LOSS_LIMIT or TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT
- `belowStrategyId`: int — Arbitrary numeric value identifying the below order within an order strategy
- `belowStrategyType`: int — Arbitrary numeric value identifying the below order strategy (>= 1000000)
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Select response format: ACK, RESULT, FULL
- `selfTradePreventionMode`: str — The allowed enums is dependent on what is configured on the symbol
- `recvWindow`: int — The value cannot be greater than 60000
- `timestamp`: int — required

### `client.create_order(**params)`
> Send in a new order Any order with an icebergQty MUST have timeInForce set to GTC.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: str — required
- `type`: str — required
- `timeInForce`: str — required if limit order
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `quoteOrderQty`: decimal — amount the user wants to spend (when buying) or receive (when selling) of the...
- `price`: str — required
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `icebergQty`: decimal — Used with LIMIT, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT to create an iceberg ...
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.create_sub_account_futures_transfer(**params)`
> Execute sub-account Futures transfer
- `fromEmail`: str — required - Sender email
- `toEmail`: str — required - Recipient email
- `futuresType`: int — required
- `asset`: str — required
- `amount`: decimal — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.create_test_order(**params)`
> Test new order creation and signature/recvWindow long. Creates and validates a new order but does not send it into the matching engine.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: str — required
- `type`: str — required
- `timeInForce`: str — required if limit order
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `price`: str — required
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `icebergQty`: decimal — Used with iceberg orders
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — The number of milliseconds the request is valid for

- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_aggregate_trades(**params)`
> Get compressed, aggregate trades. Trades that fill at the time, from the same order, with the same price will have the quantity aggregated.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `fromId`: str — ID to get aggregate trades from INCLUSIVE.
- `startTime`: int — Timestamp in ms to get aggregate trades from INCLUSIVE.
- `endTime`: int — Timestamp in ms to get aggregate trades until INCLUSIVE.
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000.

### `client.get_all_coins_info(**params)`
> Get information of coins (available for deposit and withdraw) for user.
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.get_all_isolated_margin_symbols(**params)`
> Query isolated margin symbol info for all pairs .. code:: python pair_details = client.get_all_isolated_margin_symbols()

### `client.get_all_margin_orders(**params)`
> Query all margin accounts orders If orderId is set, it will get orders >= that orderId. Otherwise most recent orders are returned. For some historical orders cummulativeQuoteQty will be < 0, meaning the data is not available at this time.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `orderId`: str — optional
- `startTime`: str — optional
- `endTime`: str — optional
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_all_orders(**params)`
> Get all account orders; active, canceled, or filled.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `orderId`: int — The unique order id
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `fromAllocationId`: int — optional
- `orderId`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional, Default: 500; Max: 1000
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_deposit_history(**params)`
> Fetch deposit history.
- `coin`: int — optional
- `startTime`: long — optional
- `endTime`: long — optional
- `offset`: long — optional - default:0
- `limit`: long — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_dust_assets(**params)`
> Get assets that can be converted into BNB

### `client.get_dust_log(**params)`
> Get log of small amounts exchanged for BNB.
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_enabled_isolated_margin_account_limit(**params)`
> Query enabled isolated margin account limit.

### `client.get_exchange_info()`
> Return rate limits and list of symbols

### `client.get_fiat_deposit_withdraw_history(**params)`
> Get Fiat Deposit/Withdraw History
- `transactionType`: str — required - 0-deposit,1-withdraw
- `beginTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `page`: int — optional - default 1
- `rows`: int — optional - default 100, max 500
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.get_fiat_payments_history(**params)`
> Get Fiat Payments History
- `transactionType`: str — required - 0-buy,1-sell
- `beginTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `page`: int — optional - default 1
- `rows`: int — optional - default 100, max 500
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.get_fixed_activity_project_list(**params)`
> Get Fixed and Activity Project List
- `asset`: str — optional
- `type`: str — required - "ACTIVITY", "CUSTOMIZED_FIXED"
- `status`: str — optional - "ALL", "SUBSCRIBABLE", "UNSUBSCRIBABLE"; default "ALL"
- `sortBy`: str — optional - "START_TIME", "LOT_SIZE", "INTEREST_RATE", "DURATION"; default "ST...
- `current`: int — optional - Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — optional - Default:10, Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_future_hourly_interest_rate(**params)`
> Get user the next hourly estimate interest
- `assets`: str — List of assets, separated by commas, up to 20
- `isIsolated`: bool — for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"

### `client.get_historical_klines(symbol, interval, start_str=None, end_str=None, limit=None, klines_type=HistoricalKlinesType.SPOT)`
> Get Historical Klines from Binance
- `symbol`: str — Name of symbol pair e.g. BNBBTC
- `interval`: str — Binance Kline interval
- `start_str`: str|int — optional - start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds
- `end_str`: str|int — optional - end date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds (defaul...
- `limit`: int — Default 1000; max 1000.
- `klines_type`: HistoricalKlinesType — Historical klines type: SPOT or FUTURES

### `client.get_historical_klines_generator(symbol, interval, start_str=None, end_str=None, limit=None, klines_type=HistoricalKlinesType.SPOT)`
> Get Historical Klines generator from Binance
- `symbol`: str — Name of symbol pair e.g. BNBBTC
- `interval`: str — Binance Kline interval
- `start_str`: str|int — optional - Start date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds
- `end_str`: str|int — optional - end date string in UTC format or timestamp in milliseconds (defaul...
- `limit`: int — amount of candles to return per request (default 1000)
- `klines_type`: HistoricalKlinesType — Historical klines type: SPOT or FUTURES

### `client.get_historical_trades(**params)`
> Get older trades.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000.
- `fromId`: str — TradeId to fetch from. Default gets most recent trades.

- `symbols`: str — optional up to 5 margin pairs as a comma separated string .. code:: python ac...

> Get isolated margin fee data collection with any vip level or user's current specific data as https://www.binance.com/en/margin-fee
- `vipLevel`: int — User's current specific margin data will be returned if vipLevel is omitted
- `symbol`: str — optional

### `client.get_isolated_margin_symbol(**params)`
> Query isolated margin symbol info
- `symbol`: str — name of the symbol pair .. code:: python pair_details = client.get_isolated_m...

### `client.get_isolated_margin_tier_data(**params)`
> Get isolated margin tier data collection with any tier as https://www.binance.com/en/margin-data
- `symbol`: str — required
- `tier`: int — All margin tier data will be returned if tier is omitted
- `recvWindow` — optional: No more than 60000

### `client.get_isolated_margin_tranfer_history(**params)`
> Get transfers to isolated margin account.
- `asset`: str — name of the asset
- `symbol`: str — pair required
- `transFrom` — optional SPOT, ISOLATED_MARGIN
- `transFrom` — str SPOT, ISOLATED_MARGIN
- `transTo` — optional
- `transTo` — str
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

- `interval`: str — -
- `limit`: int — - Default 500; max 1000.
- `startTime`: int
- `endTime`: int

> Query cross-margin account details

- `asset`: str — name of the asset

### `client.get_margin_capital_flow(**params)`
> Get cross or isolated margin capital flow
- `asset`: str — optional
- `symbol`: str — Required when querying isolated data
- `type`: string — optional
- `startTime`: long — Only supports querying the data of the last 90 days
- `endTime`: long — optional
- `formId`: long — If fromId is set, the data with id > fromId will be returned. Otherwise the l...
- `limit`: long — The number of data items returned each time is limited. Default 500; Max 1000.

### `client.get_margin_delist_schedule(**params)`
> Get tokens or symbols delist schedule for cross margin and isolated margin
- `recvWindow`: int — optional - the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

- `endTime`: long — optional

### `client.get_margin_force_liquidation_rec(**params)`
> Get Force Liquidation Record (USER_DATA)
- `startTime`: str
- `endTime`: str
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_interest_history(**params)`
> Get Interest History (USER_DATA)
- `asset`: str
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `startTime`: str
- `endTime`: str
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `archived`: bool — Default: false. Set to true for archived data from 6 months ago
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_loan_details(**params)`
> Query loan record txId or startTime must be sent. txId takes precedence.
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `txId`: str — the tranId in of the created loan
- `startTime`: str — earliest timestamp to filter transactions
- `endTime`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_oco_order(**params)`
> Retrieves a specific OCO based on provided optional parameters
- `isIsolated`: str — for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"，default "FALSE"
- `symbol`: str — mandatory for isolated margin, not supported for cross margin
- `orderListId`: int — Either orderListId or listClientOrderId must be provided
- `listClientOrderId`: str — Either orderListId or listClientOrderId must be provided
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_order(**params)`
> Query margin accounts order Either orderId or origClientOrderId must be sent. For some historical orders cummulativeQuoteQty will be < 0, meaning the data is not available at this time.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `orderId`: str
- `origClientOrderId`: str
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_price_index(**params)`
> Query margin priceIndex
- `symbol`: str — name of the symbol pair .. code:: python price_index_details = client.get_mar...

### `client.get_margin_repay_details(**params)`
> Query repay record txId or startTime must be sent. txId takes precedence.
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `txId`: str — the tranId in of the created loan
- `startTime`: str
- `endTime`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

> Query cross-margin symbol info
- `symbol`: str — name of the symbol pair .. code:: python pair_details = client.get_margin_sym...

### `client.get_margin_trades(**params)`
> Query margin accounts trades If fromId is set, it will get orders >= that fromId. Otherwise most recent orders are returned.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `fromId`: str — optional
- `startTime`: str — optional
- `endTime`: str — optional
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_margin_transfer_history(**params)`
> Query margin transfer history
- `asset`: str — optional
- `type`: str — optional Transfer Type: ROLL_IN, ROLL_OUT
- `archived`: str — optional Default: false. Set to true for archived data from 6 months ago
- `startTime`: str — earliest timestamp to filter transactions
- `endTime`: str — Used to uniquely identify this cancel. Automatically generated by default.
- `current`: str — Currently querying page. Start from 1. Default:1
- `size`: int — Default:10 Max:100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_max_margin_loan(**params)`
> Query max borrow amount for an asset
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

> Query max transfer-out amount
- `asset`: str — required
- `isolatedSymbol`: str — isolated symbol (if querying isolated margin)
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_my_trades(**params)`
> Get trades for a specific symbol.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — Default 500; max 1000.
- `fromId`: int — TradeId to fetch from. Default gets most recent trades.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_open_margin_oco_orders(**params)`
> Retrieves open OCO trades
- `isIsolated`: str — for isolated margin or not, "TRUE", "FALSE"，default "FALSE"
- `symbol`: str — mandatory for isolated margin, not supported for cross margin
- `fromId`: int — If supplied, neither startTime or endTime can be provided
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional Default Value: 500; Max Value: 1000
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_open_margin_orders(**params)`
> Query margin accounts open orders If the symbol is not sent, orders for all symbols will be returned in an array (cross-margin only). If querying isolated margin orders, both the isIsolated='TRUE' and symbol=symbol_name must be set. When all symbols are returned, the number of requests counted against the rate limiter is equal to the number of symbols currently trading on the exchange.
- `symbol`: str — optional
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_open_oco_orders(**params)`
> Get all open orders on a symbol.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_open_orders(**params)`
> Get all open orders on a symbol.
- `symbol`: str — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_order(**params)`
> Check an order's status. Either orderId or origClientOrderId must be sent.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `orderId`: int — The unique order id
- `origClientOrderId`: str — optional
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.get_order_book(**params)`
> Get the Order Book for the market
- `symbol`: str — required
- `limit`: int — Default 100; max 1000

### `client.get_orderbook_ticker(**params)`
> Latest price for a symbol or symbols.
- `symbol`: str

### `client.get_orderbook_tickers(**params)`

- `symbol`: str — optional
- `symbols`: str — optional accepted format  ["BTCUSDT","BNBUSDT"] or %5B%22BTCUSDT%22,%22BNBUSD...

- `limit`: int — optional - default 100, max 100
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

- `symbol`: str — required

- `orderId`: int — optional
- `fromPreventedMatchId`: int — optional
- `limit`: int — optional, Default: 500; Max: 1000
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.isolated_margin_stream_close(symbol, listenKey)`
> Close out an isolated margin data stream.
- `symbol`: str — required - symbol for the isolated margin account
- `listenKey`: str — required

### `client.isolated_margin_stream_get_listen_key(symbol)`
> Start a new isolated margin data stream and return the listen key If a stream already exists it should return the same key. If the stream becomes invalid a new key is returned. Can be used to keep the stream alive.
- `symbol`: str — required - symbol for the isolated margin account

### `client.isolated_margin_stream_keepalive(symbol, listenKey)`
> PING an isolated margin data stream to prevent a time out.
- `symbol`: str — required - symbol for the isolated margin account
- `listenKey`: str — required

> Universal Transfer (For Master Account)
- `fromEmail`: str — optional
- `toEmail`: str — optional
- `fromAccountType`: str — required - "SPOT","USDT_FUTURE","COIN_FUTURE"
- `toAccountType`: str — required - "SPOT","USDT_FUTURE","COIN_FUTURE"
- `asset`: str — required - The asset being transferred, e.g., USDT
- `amount`: float — required
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

- `asset`: str — required
- `amount`: str — required
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.new_transfer_history(**params)`
> Get future account transaction history list

### `client.order_limit(timeInForce="GTC", **params)`
> Send in a new limit order Any order with an icebergQty MUST have timeInForce set to GTC.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `price`: str — required
- `timeInForce`: str — default Good till cancelled
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `icebergQty`: decimal — Used with LIMIT, STOP_LOSS_LIMIT, and TAKE_PROFIT_LIMIT to create an iceberg ...
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_limit_buy(timeInForce="GTC", **params)`
> Send in a new limit buy order Any order with an icebergQty MUST have timeInForce set to GTC.
- `symbol`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `price`: str — required
- `timeInForce`: str — default Good till cancelled
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `stopPrice`: decimal — Used with stop orders
- `icebergQty`: decimal — Used with iceberg orders
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_limit_sell(timeInForce="GTC", **params)`
> Send in a new limit sell order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `price`: str — required
- `timeInForce`: str — default Good till cancelled
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `stopPrice`: decimal — Used with stop orders
- `icebergQty`: decimal — Used with iceberg orders
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_market(**params)`
> Send in a new market order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `side`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `quoteOrderQty`: decimal — amount the user wants to spend (when buying) or receive (when selling) of the...
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_market_buy(**params)`
> Send in a new market buy order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `quoteOrderQty`: decimal — the amount the user wants to spend of the quote asset
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_market_sell(**params)`
> Send in a new market sell order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `quoteOrderQty`: decimal — the amount the user wants to receive of the quote asset
- `newClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_oco_buy(**params)`
> Send in a new OCO buy order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `listClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the list order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `limitClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the limit order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `price`: str — required
- `limitIcebergQty`: decimal — Used to make the LIMIT_MAKER leg an iceberg order.
- `stopClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the stop order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `stopPrice`: str — required
- `stopLimitPrice`: str — If provided, stopLimitTimeInForce is required.
- `stopIcebergQty`: decimal — Used with STOP_LOSS_LIMIT leg to make an iceberg order.
- `stopLimitTimeInForce`: str — Valid values are GTC/FOK/IOC.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.order_oco_sell(**params)`
> Send in a new OCO sell order
- `symbol`: str — required
- `listClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the list order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `quantity`: decimal — required
- `limitClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the limit order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `price`: str — required
- `limitIcebergQty`: decimal — Used to make the LIMIT_MAKER leg an iceberg order.
- `stopClientOrderId`: str — A unique id for the stop order. Automatically generated if not sent.
- `stopPrice`: str — required
- `stopLimitPrice`: str — If provided, stopLimitTimeInForce is required.
- `stopIcebergQty`: decimal — Used with STOP_LOSS_LIMIT leg to make an iceberg order.
- `stopLimitTimeInForce`: str — Valid values are GTC/FOK/IOC.
- `newOrderRespType`: str — Set the response JSON. ACK, RESULT, or FULL; default: RESULT.
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

> Test connectivity to the Rest API.

### `client.query_subaccount_spot_summary(**params)`
> Query Sub-account Spot Assets Summary (For Master Account)
- `email`: str — optional - Sub account email
- `page`: int — optional - default 1
- `size`: int — optional - default 10, max 20
- `recvWindow`: int — optional

### `client.query_universal_transfer_history(**params)`
> Query User Universal Transfer History
- `type`: str (ENUM) — required
- `startTime`: int — optional
- `endTime`: int — optional
- `current`: int — optional - Default 1
- `size`: int — required - Default 10, Max 100
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.repay_margin_loan(**params)`
> Repay loan in cross-margin or isolated-margin account. If amount is more than the amount borrowed, the full loan will be repaid.
- `asset`: str — name of the asset
- `amount`: str — amount to transfer
- `isIsolated`: str — set to 'TRUE' for isolated margin (default 'FALSE')
- `symbol`: str — Isolated margin symbol (default blank for cross-margin)
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

### `client.set_auto_staking(**params)`
> Set Auto Staking on Locked Staking or Locked DeFi Staking

### `client.set_margin_max_leverage(**params)`
> Adjust cross margin max leverage
- `maxLeverage`: int — required Can only adjust 3 or 5，Example: maxLeverage=3

### `client.stake_asset_us(**params)`
> Stake a supported asset. :raises BinanceRegionException: If client is not configured for binance.us

### `client.stream_close(listenKey)`
> Close out a user data stream.
- `listenKey`: str — required

### `client.stream_get_listen_key()`
> Start a new user data stream and return the listen key If a stream already exists it should return the same key. If the stream becomes invalid a new key is returned. Can be used to keep the user stream alive.

### `client.stream_keepalive(listenKey)`
> PING a user data stream to prevent a time out.
- `listenKey`: str — required

- `amount`: str — required
- `autoSubscribe`: bool — optional - Default True
- `recvWindow`: int — the number of milliseconds the request is valid for

- `spotBNBBurn`: bool — Determines whether to use BNB to pay for trading fees on SPOT
- `interestBNBBurn`: bool — Determines whether to use BNB to pay for margin loan's interest .. code:: pyt...
